label: Domain randomization & simulation curricula

node.label: Domain randomization & simulation curricula
node.definition: Domain randomization varies simulated appearance, dynamics, sensors, delays, objects, and disturbances so a policy learns behavior robust across many plausible worlds.
node.why_it_matters: It attempts to make the real environment look like one more sample from the training distribution.
limitations: Poor parameter ranges waste capacity or omit the real system, and excessive randomization can suppress useful structure.

dependencies.rationale: Domain randomization & simulation curricula uses Sim-to-real, real-to-sim & digital transfer as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Domain randomization & simulation curricula uses Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Domain randomization & simulation curricula uses Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Domain randomization & simulation curricula uses Multimodal, simulated & streaming data as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Domain randomization varies simulated appearance, dynamics, sensors, delays, objects, and disturbances so a policy learns behavior robust across many plausible worlds.
It attempts to make the real environment look like one more sample from the training distribution.
Poor parameter ranges waste capacity or omit the real system, and excessive randomization can suppress useful structure.
